nodes.name: LC

nodes.name: Myioborus
nodes.summary: Myioborus（Myioborus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Painted redstart、Slate-throated whitestart、Brown-capped whitestart等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: Guaiquinima whitestart
nodes.summary: The Guaiquinima whitestart (Myioborus cardonai), also known as the Guaiquinima redstart, saffron-breasted whitestart or saffron-breasted redstart, is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is endemic to humid highland forests on Cerro Guaiquinima in south-eastern Venezuela. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
